title: Architecture Extensions
description: A mod that allows you to make more detailed builds with all kinds of new building blocks and shapes.
body:
[![Join our Discord server.](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/intergrav/devins-badges/assets/cozy/social/discord-plural_vector.svg)](https://discord.debuggy.gay) [![Requires Quilt Standard Libraries](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/intergrav/devins-badges/assets/cozy/requires/quilt-standard-libraries_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/qsl) [![Has Tablesaw support.](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/intergrav/devins-badges/assets/cozy/supported/tablesaw_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/tablesaw) ![No Fabric!](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/intergrav/devins-badges/assets/cozy/unsupported/fabric_vector.svg) ![No Forge!](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/intergrav/devins-badges/assets/cozy/unsupported/forge_vector.svg) [![Read the Arch-Ex documentation.](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/intergrav/devins-badges/assets/cozy/documentation/generic_vector.svg)](https://github.com/DebuggyTeam/architecture-extensions/wiki) [![Help us translate Arch-Ex to your native language.](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/intergrav/devins-badges/assets/cozy/translate/generic-plural_vector.svg)](https://github.com/DebuggyTeam/architecture-extensions/blob/1.20/src/main/resources/assets/architecture_extensions/lang) [![Check out the Arch-Ex gallery.](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/intergrav/devins-badges/assets/cozy/documentation/modrinth-gallery_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/arch-ex/gallery)

Temporary PSA

Soul Ice and Aurora's Deco blocks were "removed" when the mod was rewritten. Back up your worlds when upgrading to Arch-Ex 2. ## About The mod idea for Architecture Extensions is technically based off the old ArchitectureCraft mod from MC 1.8-1.10 but the key differences are the block models retain the Minecraft pixelation and there are new blocktypes added.

Conventional Cubes' Lo-Fi wood beams:

Cyberpunk Slums at BC23 utilzing roof blocks:

Go to the gallery page for more images showcasing this mod: [Architecture Extensions gallery](https://modrinth.com/mod/arch-ex/gallery) ## Mods that have Arch-Ex Integration - [Amarite](https://modrinth.com/mod/amarite) - [Conventional Cubes](https://modrinth.com/mod/conventional-cubes) - [Create Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) - [Heart of the Machine](https://modrinth.com/mod/heart-of-the-machine) - [Moue Milkshakes](https://modrinth.com/mod/moue-milkshakes) - [Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-spirit) - [Softer Pastels](https://modrinth.com/mod/softer-pastels) | [Check out their Gallery](https://modrinth.com/mod/softer-pastels/gallery) - [Tropics](https://modrinth.com/mod/tropics) ## Credits - Carter for the Rose Quartz and H Beam textures: [#8 on Github](https://github.com/DebuggyTeam/architecture-extensions/pull/8) - Azagwen for the roof block models: [#7 on Github](https://github.com/DebuggyTeam/architecture-extensions/pull/7) - Everyone in the Quilt Community discord for helping me with this mod. - Crackers0106 for mod icon. - Maximum for rewriting the whole mod and adding datagen stuff on top: [#16 on Github](https://github.com/DebuggyTeam/architecture-extensions/pull/16) - Falkreon for helping with datagen stuff.
